sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8787" key="a)nqokome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-κομέω</orth>, <sense id="n8787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">produce flowers,</tr_> of the earth, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βοτάνας ἀ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.321</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
